# {{ .Site.Title }}

> {{ .Site.Params.description }}

## Documentation Map
{{ with site.GetPage "/docs" }}
{{- range .Sections }}
{{- template "llms-section" . }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}

{{- define "llms-section" -}}
{{- "\n" -}}
## {{ .Title }}
{{- if and (not .RegularPages) .RawContent }}
{{ if .Params.description }}
{{ .Params.description }}
{{ end }}
{{- $headings := findRE `(?m)^#{2,4} .+` .RawContent }}
{{- range $headings }}
{{- $text := replaceRE `^#{2,4} ` "" . }}
{{- if hasPrefix . "#### " }}
    * {{ $text }}
{{- else if hasPrefix . "### " }}
  * {{ $text }}
{{- else }}
* {{ $text }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}
{{ range .RegularPages }}
{{- template "llms-page" . }}
{{- end }}
{{- range .Sections }}
{{- template "llms-section" . }}
{{- end }}
{{- end -}}

{{- define "llms-page" }}

### [{{ .Title }}]({{ .Permalink }})
{{ if .Params.description }}
{{ .Params.description }}
{{ end }}
{{- $headings := findRE `(?m)^#{2,4} .+` .RawContent }}
{{- range $headings }}
{{- $text := replaceRE `^#{2,4} ` "" . }}
{{- if hasPrefix . "#### " }}
    * {{ $text }}
{{- else if hasPrefix . "### " }}
  * {{ $text }}
{{- else }}
* {{ $text }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}
{{- end -}}
